Blocks For Fun - Version : 0.02


I developed this game for fun. It is inspired by the original falling-block puzzle format. The source code for this project is available under the MIT License.

Note! I used fontawesome, and two arcade sounds from pixabay. The sapphire Icon is from Icon8 The background image is from Pexels by Laura Tancredi. Finally, the beep sound is from a sample on thecodelearners.com

Third-party assets and services keep their original licenses or attribution requirements.

The game works well on all modern browsers.

This game is developed by Raed Gharzeddine

Feel free to contact me on Linkedin.

Would you like to end this game and start a new one?
